title: Radio
description: A radio button lets users select exactly one option from a set.
whenToUse: Mutually exclusive selection from 2–5 options. When the user must see all options at once.
whenNotToUse: For more than 5 options, use a dropdown select instead. For multiple selections, use checkboxes.

keyboard.action: Move focus into/out of the group
Move between radios in the group

_legacyAccessibilityNotes: Use role="radiogroup" on the container with an accessible label (via aria-labelledby or the legend element).
